ModMetaData.name: The Antagonist
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description:
The Antagonist is a custom AI storyteller for RimWorld that knows how strong you really are.
Most storytellers size their threats from colony wealth and head-count, which badly under-reads a levelled party - a level 300 hero in plain gear looks "cheap", so late-game raids turn into a formality. The Antagonist reads your ISEKAI RPG Leveling levels and grows with your heroes: as they climb the ranks, it hits back harder, up to roughly 4.5x the normal threat budget at max level.
Its threat scaling is power-weighted, so one strong hero raises the danger for the whole party - you cannot hide a max-level carry behind nine rookies. It never makes the game easier than normal; it only ever escalates.
Event pacing follows a rising curve of challenge and tension: it pushes you with dangerous events, gives you breathing room, then comes back to push once more.
Requires ISEKAI RPG Leveling. Ships with a placeholder portrait. Safe to add to or remove from any save at any time, and pairs perfectly with the Improved Defaults mod, which can pre-select The Antagonist automatically for every new game.
